lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: That steel order came through clean. You were right about the buyer.

lines.speaker: Trencher
lines.line: Told you. Listen, I know three more suppliers who'd kill for a reliable smith.

lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: Not interested in your schemes, Trencher. Just steady work and fair coin.

lines.speaker: Trencher
lines.line: Fair coin gets you expansion. My schemes get you rich. Think on it.
